title: Makeup Spatula 6Pcs, Silicone Spatula Set Mini Small Spatula for food Bottle Beauty Spatula Tiny Lotion Jar Scraper to Get Last of Makeup Out（Multicolor)
description:
About this item
✅【No Waste of Any】: Our makeup spatula has a long enough body and narrow head for reaching food in jars and other narrow spaces,even for bottle with slight opening grocery, and personal care item. Prevent waste of your products.
✅【3 Sizes Fits Most Containers】: This mini spatula with 3 different sizes fits for most all different sizes of bottles of daily use. With different sizes spatula and small spoon at the end, perfect for jar using, easily to take out how any amount you need.
✅【Safety Premium Material】: Our small spatula make with 100% food grade silicone and stainless steel core inside, sturdy and durable material which could be used for any food and makeup, BPA FREE, safe and health, flexible and stand the test of time, long service life.
✅【Easy to Clean & Widely Usage】: Silicone jar spatulas can be run in the dishwasher. Hand washing is recommended. Suitable for peanut butter and ketchup, Jars, Honey, Cosmetics, Hand Lotion, Pain Cream, Body Lotion, Foundation, Hair Products, Shampoo, Conditioner, Lip gloss, Nail Polish, and so on.
✅【Best Customer Service】: If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us at any time, we will do our best to reply you quickly with the most satisfactory service.
reviews_5s:
I found this very helpful to get remaining foundation out of the bottle and face lotion. I’m sure I will have other uses for this as well. It’s very well-made and good variety of sizes.I bought a set of silicone spatulas to use with my skincare jars, and I’m really happy with them! The set comes with different sizes, so they work well for all kinds of jars. Each spatula has two sides—one side is a scoop, and the other is flat like a spatula. The scoop makes it easy to get product out of jars without getting it under my nails, and the flat side helps me use every last bit of the product. They’re also super easy to clean. I just wipe them off with a towel or rinse them under water.The various sizes of the spatulas are great. Not all cosmetic containers are the same height.These are the best small spatulas! I use the large one the most. It is flexible, but sturdy. Easy to clean! I highly recommend these. Also make great gifts, especially for someone that enjoys cooking.I wanted something to help avoid waste of condiments and dressings from smaller jars and containers. Regular spatula scrapers are too big to fit. These are perfect and they're sturdy, so they should hold up for a long time.I like the spatula I like that it came in a variety pack so I have a spatula for every type of bottle I have I’m no longer wasting products because it gets all the products out and they’re easy to clean too a great purchaseThis company has seriously exceeded my expectations. After reading my comments (last part of this review), they contacted me, offering a refund since I was unhappy with part of the purchase. I declined since I'd decided to keep it, but their offer speaks volumns about their commitment to their customers. They contacted me a second time, insisting I accept the spoon/spatulas as a gift and issued me a refund of the purchase price. Btw, although these items are longer than I had expected (because I did not read the specs carefully enough) they are VERY useful. I use a serum that comes in a small glass jar with a pump. Product is always wasted since the pump can't suction the remaining teaspoon or so up in its tube. Now, I am amazed by how much this little spoon extends the use of the serum. ORIGINAL REVIEW: I almost returned these because two of the three sizes are too long. I was hoping for something more like 4 inches, 5 inches, and 6 inches, as these lengths would be more helpful. All the other varieties had similar lengths, so I decided to keep them. At least two of the six are what I wanted.I was looking for something to help me get the last bits of my very expensive prescription cream out of its container and these mini spatulas did it. I have also used the taller ones to get the last bits of food out of jars of food such as salad dressing or ketchup. I was doubtful at first since I have tried similar products before only to have them not work or break quickly after a few uses but these are great.They are just what I was looking for to scrape the last drop of dressing, PB and jelly, etc... out of my food jars. 3 pairs of different sizes seem to be of good quality and should last a long time and expect to be able
to get to the bottom of all my containers.These are perfect to get the last bit product from the container. I've used them for face cream, foundation, and hair dye. Just what I needed! Nice that it's a set with different lengths too.
reviews_1s: Seem sturdy and pliable, but one of the tools was missing and the purple ones seem comically large to be used for anything close to what is advertisedThe smallest spatula is more than 6” long!The spoon and spatula side are very small. The length of these things are very random as well. I would've returned them if I opened them soon enough to do so.Waaay too big
